description: John Zenon, a 38-year-old technician, is transferring to a specialized chemical processing unit and requires mandatory medical clearance for a full-facepiece supplied-air respirator per OSHA standard 1910.134. As the Occupational Health and Safety Technician, complete the baseline respirator medical clearance in GNU Health. The clearance must include an administrative/occupational exam diagnosis (ICD-10 Z02.x or Z10.x), a clinical evaluation with baseline Heart Rate and Respiratory Rate, a baseline Chest X-ray order, a baseline screening Lab test order (e.g., CBC or CMP), and a scheduled quantitative fit test appointment 7 to 14 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
